boundary_binding.action_boundary: May HR or payroll execute the requested workforce, pay, benefits, or employment-status action? Focus: tax withholding correction using stale unsigned draft form.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Exact current control record closes the boundary for this action.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No open defect remains; do not overblock on warning tone.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: GATE satisfied by current control record and policy.

critical_features_preserved: current withholding form and employee identity verification match
final_answer: Allow. The exact current control record states the withholding form and employee identity verification are current, exact, and tied to the requested action, which closes the source boundary. The warning language in the boundary note does not override the controlling source record.
